title: paraprasophyllum colensoi
intro: Paraprasophyllum colensoi, also known as the New Zealand orchid or Colenso's paraprasophyllum, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Paraprasophyllum colensoi include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent the growth of bacteria and other pathogens. Herbal preparations of Paraprasophyllum colensoi can be made by drying the leaves and roots, then infusing them in water or using them in a topical cream or salve.
